title: Plöttr — a browser-only data-analysis toolbox for wet-lab scientists
description: Plöttr is a browser-only data-visualisation and statistics toolbox for wet-lab scientists. It runs entirely client-side — no server, no tracking, no data leaving the browser — and renders publication-ready SVG charts from pasted CSV / TSV data.

creators.name: Mbengue, Malick
creators.affiliation: Laboratoire de Recherche en Sciences Végétales (LRSV), Université de Toulouse, CNRS, UPS, Toulouse INP, Castanet-Tolosan, France.
